title: Passive Armor
description: Make hostile mobs stop targeting you.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hucoNDUN/images/841c465b32155c41e8cf2a9c64492484b60b2460.png) A Minecraft mod which adds "catalysts" which can be used on armor pieces to prevent mobs from targeting you. ## What does it do? This mod makes end game less annoying. After you have gotten your hands on some nether star, you can make mobs targeting system to ignore you! (atmost 4 types of mobs at once) ## Images
![Passified Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99c0d87a90c8d963e03772b5c7704b9d680eb26e.gif) Wearing an iron chestplate with Creeper catalyst

Supported Mobs

Zombie Skeleton Creeper
Spider Witch Enderman
Pillagers Wither Skeleton Shulker
Slime Magma Cube Ghast
Blaze Phantom
Requires Fabric API
